movie_idea: A gritty detective tries to solve a case in a cyberpunk city.
characters: Detective Vance (trench coat, cybernetic eye), Informant Jax

panels.context: Vance standing in the rain looking at a neon sign.
Vance interrogates Jax in a dark alley.
A close up of Vance's cybernetic eye glowing.
Vance walks away into the fog.
